title: Non-record Submission: CrystalGPT + Diamond Fusion — Ternary Crystal Architecture
author: ivanontech

data.description: A single shared transformer block is repeated multiple times with per-iteration modulation gates instead of using unique stacked layers.
Parameter tying across repeated crystal iterations to reuse the same block many times.
Uses partial rotary positional embeddings on a subset of dimensions.
Grouped-query attention with fewer key/value heads than query heads.
CrystalBlock uses residual mixing via resid_mix and zero-init projections.
Introduces YES/NO/MAYBE state space to model uncertainty as a first-class citizen.
DiamondFusion performs consensus-weighted multi-expert fusion with an agreement bonus / variance-based consensus bonus.
Skip connections are used across crystal iterations.
Uses LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, a squared leaky ReLU activation in the MLP.
Projection layers are initialized to zero in the CrystalBlock.
Per-iteration crystal modulation gates (attn_gate, mlp_gate) modulate attention and MLP paths across repeated block passes.

novel_contributions: Single shared transformer block repeated N times with per-iteration crystal modulation gates
Diamond Fusion junctions with consensus-weighted expert fusion and agreement bonus
Ternary voting ensemble using YES/NO/MAYBE states
U-Net style skip connections across crystal iterations
Parameter tying for strong parameter efficiency (~3.4M parameters)
Partial RoPE, grouped-query attention, and custom squared LeakyReLU MLP within the crystal architecture
